meaning: n.(缅甸人、泰国人信奉的)守护神,精灵,神怪;network address translation,网址解析
examples: You can create an access list of IP addresses that tells the router which computers on the network require NAT.
NAT only translates traffic which travel between the inside and outside network and is specified to be translated.
Chinese customs began NAT on inbound arrivals at all points of entry.
The problem is our government needs to endorse Nat Gas today, not tomorrow or sometime later.
Nat Fraser was originally charged, along with two other men, of conspiring to murder Arlene Fraser.
